name: The stairwell of the Last Homely House
description:
You are standing in the very center of the Last Homely House, in the middle of
a large stairwell that spirals up towards the bell tower.  The staircase curves
about the wooden walls, running on each wall in turn before vanishing up into
the bell tower above.  An elaborately carved banister encloses the staircase,
delicately carved with images of flowers and ivy.
